name: Read repositories on Drizzle
outcome: Client, scope, and user repositories read from Drizzle, returning entities with their scopes, preserving the @jmondi interfaces.
scope: client_repository, scope_repository, user_repository on Drizzle. Persist-side repos are a separate slice.
acceptance_criteria: ClientRepository.getByIdentifier returns a client with its linked scopes loaded
ScopeRepository.getAllByIdentifiers returns matching scopes and finalize returns them verbatim
UserRepository.getUserByCredentials returns the User entity and verifies the password when supplied; no @prisma/client imports remain
steps: src/app/oauth/repositories/client_repository.ts — getByIdentifier via db.query.oauthClients with { scopes }; reimplement isClientValid preserving the allowedGrants check
src/app/oauth/repositories/scope_repository.ts — getAllByIdentifiers via a Drizzle select where name in scopeNames; finalize returns scopes verbatim
src/app/oauth/repositories/user_repository.ts — getUserByCredentials via Drizzle select by id, calling verifyPasswordOrThrow when a password is supplied
tests — repo tests asserting client scopes load via the join and getAllByIdentifiers filters by name
notes: Read-mostly repos; the seed provides their data. Keep @jmondi method names/signatures intact (getByIdentifier, isClientValid, getAllByIdentifiers, finalize, getUserByCredentials).
